title: Revisão humana, correção única e obrigação atômica da Fase 5

artifacts.reference: 66 passed with PostgreSQL 16 ephemeral; 28 passed and 38 skipped without database
0013_review_and_obligation; reviews table; correction partial unique index; scoped sessions; append-only triggers
one SANDBOX ASSIGNMENT_APPROVED transaction with balanced TASK_RESERVED debit and PARTICIPANT_PAYABLE credit
OpenAPI adminSession, review queue/detail/decision and participant-owned obligation read

positive_results: Two concurrent approvals returned one Review, one PaymentObligation and one approval ledger transaction.
A forced ledger reference conflict rolled back Review, AuditEvent, PaymentObligation and assignment state together.
REQUEST_CHANGES without reason failed; resubmission produced version 2; a second correction failed.
Participant cookie could not authorize admin routes and a non-allowlisted pubkey could not create an admin session.
The HTTP journey covered separate admin login, queue, private detail, approval, idempotent retry and owner-only obligation read.
Migration-owner mutation attempts proved Review and obligation economic fields immutable while allowing the later status transition required by clearing.
limitations: Self-verified evidence in a dirty workspace does not satisfy the S2 acceptance gate.
Administrative NIP-07 was exercised with deterministic test signatures, not a real browser extension or popup.
The allowlisted administrative pubkeys still need external configuration for a deployed environment.
No real financial dispatch, invoice, CLN, xpay or listpays behavior is evidenced.
DIV-OBLIGATION-MUTABILITY-001 records the unresolved wording conflict for status updates before Phase 6.
This evidence authorizes no external effect.
